description: Build persistent notification center with unread indicators, filtering, and clear-read controls.

userStories.title: Persist notification read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want read state saved so that notification state persists across sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Store per-user notification read state and read timestamp in persistent storage
Existing notifications default to unread where read state is absent
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add backend notification list and unread-count query
userStories.description: As a user, I want notification data and unread counts so that the interface can show current state.
acceptanceCriteria: Query returns notifications for current user with read state ordered newest first
Query returns unread count for current user
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement mark read and mark unread actions
userStories.description: As a user, I want to mark notifications read or unread so that I can manage my unread queue.
acceptanceCriteria: Provide action to toggle read state for a user-owned notification
Marking read sets read timestamp and marking unread clears read timestamp
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Show unread badge and notification list surface
userStories.description: As a user, I want unread badge and notification list UI so that I can see and open notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation or header shows unread badge count from notification query
Notification center list shows notifications with read/unread visual state
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Filter notification list by read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter notifications by read state so that I can focus on unread or read items.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification center offers All, Unread, and Read filters
Selected filter updates displayed notifications accordingly
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Clear all read notifications
userStories.description: As a user, I want to clear all read notifications so that the list stays focused on pending items.
acceptanceCriteria: Provide action that clears read notifications for current user only
After clear action, notification list and unread badge refresh correctly
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
